response: This code implements the standard post-insertion fixup algorithm for red-black trees, a class of self-balancing binary search trees, to restore the core red-black tree invariants violated when a new red node is inserted. It resolves invalid consecutive red parent-child pairs by either recoloring the parent, uncle, and grandparent if the new node’s uncle is red, or performing left/right tree rotations plus recoloring to restructure the tree if the uncle is black, ending by enforcing the required invariant that the tree’s root is always black.
